🌼 || Let me know if there are any issues with the bot! || 🌼

⭐️ || Bot mistakes you as a girl? : click on chat memory and type in “{{user}} is a boy, not a girl” (might work, but not 100%) || ⭐️

☀️ || Bot keeps talking for you? : click on chat memory and type in “Only speak and decide actions for {{char}}, not {{user}}” || ☀️

☁️ || Bot has bad memory? : same solution as the first two issues, just type in the things that the bot forgot and generate a new response! || ☁️
